summary: Reviewer 01 read-only pre-response/fail-closed review of DinoBrain unfinished improvement plan. Reviewed AGENTS protocol, memory registry, completion-condition docs, live hook verifier, goal verifier, and current status artifacts. Verdict: AGREE with revised criteria, with non-completion warnings around subagent consensus validity, Claude not_configured semantics, source-lineage breadth, behavior trigger coverage, and health/verify-goal parity.
decisions: Completion criteria must distinguish configured, probe-verified, and live-verified pre-response behavior.
A green health artifact is not enough if verify:goal or the unfinished review identifies stricter blockers.
Claude not_configured is acceptable absence evidence, not proof that Claude sessions use DinoBrain.
The unfinished plan should remain the active contract until ten non-empty AGREE reviewer outputs exist.
next_steps: Run all ten independent reviewer passes against the same revision when subagent output is reliable.
Keep verify:goal as the final completion gate and prevent Observatory/health from hiding stricter blockers.
Add or map missing verifier commands for answer quality, Observatory evidence, install equivalence, and release manifest.
search_queries: pre-response fail-closed direct MCP verify goal Observatory health RAG behavior recall source lineage
